header_title.description: Dzina la app ḽi khou ṱalutshedzwa kha header. App ya u wana zwiḽiwa zwa shango ḽoṱhe.

header_subtitle.description: Tagline ḽi khou ṱalutshedzwa hezwi ho ḓaho dzina la app kha header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Tshifhinga tsha u thoma kha hero ya home page.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Vhudzisa zwiḽiwa zwa vhukuma zwa dzi kitchen dzine dza vha shango ḽoṱhe
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Tshifhinga tsha u thoma tshi khou ṱalutshedzwa hezwi ho ḓaho hero ya home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Tshifhinga tsha u thoma tshi khou ṱalutshedzwa hezwi ho ḓaho recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Nḓila ya u phepha kha recipe card. {minutes} i vhuya ya shandukiwa nga nḓila ya mineti.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Dzina ḽi khou ṱalutshedzwa u bva kha vhulamukanyi kha recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Vhulamukanyi ha u sumbedza uri zwiḽiwa zwi a pfala.

recipe_card_medium.description: Vhulamukanyi ha u sumbedza uri zwiḽiwa zwi na vhulamukanyi ha pakati.

recipe_card_hard.description: Vhulamukanyi ha u sumbedza uri zwiḽiwa zwi khou vha zwa u ṱuṱuwedza.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Nḓila ya mavu a ngwedi ya pork ine ya vha hone na chashu yo vhuya, dzi egg dza u tanga nga u nyanya, na noodles dza mutshelo.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Margherita Pizza.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan ya tshivhumbeo ine ya vha na tomato dza San Marzano, mozzarella ya mutshelo, na basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Margherita Pizza.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos dza pork dzi khou swikiswa nga pineapple, cilantro, na onion kha corn tortillas.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Kuku yo vhuya kha sauce ya tomato na butter ine ya vha na zwilamulo zwa mivhili.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Butter Chicken.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Noodles dza rice dzi khou tshimbidzwa na shrimp, tofu, peanuts, na sauce ya tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Dzina ḽa recipe ya French Crepes.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes dza u fhulufhela dza u lulama dzi khou bveledzwa na Nutella, strawberries dza mutshelo, na whipped cream.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Ṱhalutshedzo ya recipe ya French Crepes.

locale_switcher_label.description: Dzina ḽi wanala kha language switcher dropdown kha header.

locale_switcher_en.description: Lugha ya English kha locale switcher.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Lugha ya Japanese kha locale switcher.

locale_switcher_es.description: Lugha ya Spanish kha locale switcher.
